name: Isekaied Into The Real World
description:
Haha! You got Isekaied into the Real World! Like an Isekai but in reverse... Reverse Isekai.

Reverse Isekai | Dead Dove (depending where you take this) | Fantasy

Info:

This bot is about you—{{user}} somehow traveling to the real world, you can be anything, a powerful sword hero, a monster or Scaramouche in a world without magic—like the one you and I live in right now!
